message.content:
In the project D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server, find and read the following files to extract the exact API interface details:

1. SpaceNodeMigrationController.java - read the full file to get all endpoint definitions, especially the new batch migration endpoints
2. BatchMigrationTaskCreateRo.java - request body class
3. BatchMigrationItem.java - sub-item class
4. BatchMigrationTaskVo.java - response class
5. BatchMigrationSubTaskVo.java - sub-task response class

For each file, provide the complete file content. Be thorough - I need exact method signatures, annotations, field names, and types.
